item.title: Debugging DNS response times with tshark, (Fri, Jan 2nd)
item.source: SANS Internet Storm Center, InfoCON: green
item.content:encoded: One of my holiday projects was to redo and optimize part of my home network. One of my homelab servers failed in November. I had only thrown the replacement in the rack to get going, but some cleanup was needed. In addition, a lot of other "layer 1" issues had to be fixed by re-crimping some network drops and doing general network hygiene. The dust buny kind hygiene, not so much the critical controls type. After all, I don't want things to overheat, and it is nice to see all network links syncing properly.

item.title: VVS Discord Stealer Using Pyarmor for Obfuscation and Detection Evasion
item.author: Pranay Kumar Chhaparwal and Lee Wei Yeong
item.content:encoded: VVS stealer (or VVS $tealer) is a Python-based infostealer targeting Discord users. It employs Pyarmor for obfuscation, contributing to its efficacy.
